title: lithocarpus abendanonii
intro: Lithocarpus abendanonii, also known as the Mindanao tan oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus abendanonii include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Lithocarpus abendanonii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
